allow: Bash(node -e "const fs = require\('fs'\); const j = JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\('firestore.indexes.json', 'utf8'\)\); console.log\('Indexes file valid JSON.\\\\nComposite indexes:', j.indexes.length\); console.log\('Single-field overrides:', j.fieldOverrides.length\); for \(const i of j.indexes\) { console.log\('  -', i.collectionGroup, '@', i.queryScope, i.fields.map\(f => f.fieldPath + ' ' + f.order\).join\(' + '\)\); }")
